extra_model_fields.estimated_effort: 4-6 implementation steps, small analytic computations; can be completed without external data
extra_model_fields.notes: All computations must use only embedded packet values (R1..R4) and supplied parameters (limits, sensitivity_shift_pct, budget).
verifier_issues_to_address: remove/clarify semantic_score fields when semantic evaluation not performed

extra_model_fields.estimated_effort: 4-6 implementation steps, small analytic computations; can be completed without external data
extra_model_fields.notes: All computations must use only embedded packet values (R1..R4) and supplied parameters (limits, sensitivity_shift_pct, budget).
verifier_issues_to_address: remove/clarify semantic_score fields when semantic evaluation not performed

planned_changes.description: Reconstruct dataset from embedded packet (R1..R4) exactly as provided in prompt. Create a small ingest step in agent_trace.json showing the read of input/task_brief and listing the four records and limit parameters as canonical sources.
expected_outputs: internal data table representation in memory (documented in agent_trace.json)

planned_changes.description: Fit simple linear models using only the four records: (a) gain_loss_dB vs rain_rate_mm_h; (b) beam_shift_deg vs rain_rate_mm_h. Use ordinary least squares (analytically computed) and record all intermediate arithmetic in field_note.md and agent_trace.json. Do not use external libraries or data.
expected_outputs: coefficients a1,b1,a2,b2 with stepwise arithmetic recorded in field_note.md

planned_changes.description: Compute predicted values and residuals per record. Define residual_flag logic: 'needs_review' if abs(residual) > (sensitivity_shift_pct/100) * |predicted| OR residual reverses expected direction relative to slope sign. Document formulas and per-record arithmetic.
expected_outputs: field_note.md showing per-record arithmetic and residual_flag logic

planned_changes.description: Run validation checks: directionality (slope sign checks), residual tolerance checks, and count records flagged. If flagged record count >= hard_threshold_record_count, include escalation recommendation. Record checks and boolean outcomes in both agent_trace.json and field_note.md.

Perform sensitivity analysis by perturbing predicted values by +/- sensitivity_shift_pct and recomputing flags and final decision. Include numeric tables and clearly state how sensitivity affects the final recommendation and budget alignment.
expected_outputs: radome_rain_compensation.csv or supplementary CSV rows showing perturbed results

planned_changes.description: Produce final recommendation table and availability/compensation decision aligned to decision_budget_usd. Clearly show cost estimate or note that no cost calculation is possible from packet alone; if action requires budget, state assumptions and mark them unresolved if not supported by packet.
expected_outputs: field_note.md recommendation table referencing decision_budget_usd and escalation logic
short CSV section or additional artifact entry with the recommendation

planned_changes.description: Write ./agent_trace.json documenting every step above with the exact required field names, and write ./actual_outputs.json summarizing produced artifacts and success. Ensure metadata fields do not assert unsupported semantic numeric scores and that deliverable_match_status reflects the actual produced files.

Sanity-check and self-verify: run a deterministic precheck to ensure artifacts exist and that the CSV columns and field_note.md contain the required content (formulas, per-record arithmetic, validation checks). Update any remaining inconsistencies.
expected_outputs: final clean submission with no deliverable metadata inconsistencies

raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Baseline failed to produce required artifacts and valid trace; metadata inconsistencies present. Need to produce the CSV and field note derived strictly from embedded records and create a valid agent trace and actual_outputs.json.
